sections.paragraph:
ἐγκάθημαι (ἐν + κατά + ἕζομαι; Aristoph., X.+; Herm. Wr. 16, 14; LXX) gener. ‘to sit in’, to take a position in, reside, dwell εἴς τι (Judg 2:2) fig., of grief in the heart Hm 10, 3, 3 (Polyb. 2, 23, 7 ἐγκαθημένου τ. ψυχαῖς τοῦ φόβου).—S. DELG s.v. ἕζομαι.

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

Herm. Wr. Herm. Wr. = Hermetic Writings—List 5

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

gener. gener. = generally

Hm Hm = Mandates

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 272
